title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: The Windows version of the prefix needs to be set to WinXP and both d3dx9_43 and d3dcompiler_43 need to be installed via winetricks. Some errors messages pop up upon launch that can simply be dismissed. The game also doesn't exit cleanly, so you need to kill the wineserver manually. PhysX performance is really bad.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Game did not launch so installed dotnet35 in wine prefix and set to WinXP in winecfg. After recommended tweaks, game still does not launch.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
Here is what I did to make it runs:
1) Install "protontricks"    2) Run this command "protontricks 35140 winxp"    3) Run this command "protontricks 35140 dotnet20 vcrun2005 dsound dmusic mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10"    4) Use this launch option to run the game "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%"    5) Try to run the game, just click OK when an error message appear.    6) Enjoy    I get a sound glitches after a while, restarting the game fix it. The sound glitch will dissappear eventually if you just ignore it. Physx performance is very bad, better left it off. That is why I didn't install physx. Original solution comes from here : https://lutris.net/games/install/342/view
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: This method works as posted by someone else before: 1) Install "protontricks" 2) Run this command "protontricks 35140 winxp" 3) Run this command "protontricks 35140 dotnet20 vcrun2005 dsound dmusic mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10" 4) Use this launch option to run the game "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%" 5) Try to run the game, just click OK when an error message appear. There's issue with sound during cinematics but no other issues observed.

title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
This is a weird one. At first it would not run AT ALL for me. After trying to install dotnet like 4 times and waiting about 2 hours altogether, I had already given up hope. But suddenly it worked?! 

Now I can play it with slightly lower settings than I could in Windows without a hitch at 50-60fps! 

If other games just crash for you (e.g. Brothers - A Tale of two sons), copy this prefix into the other game's prefix folder, click play, be patient while it does its first-time setup and eventually it will run!

title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
What was tested: Story Mode
What was not tested: DLC/Challenge mode
Performance: Averages 60fps with some spikes dropping down to ~30fps

I had to remove the prefix that steam created to install the dotnet20 for 64bit, install the needed overrides using winetricks (you can use protontricks if you want) and install d9vk https://github.com/Joshua-Ashton/d9vk/releases/.

(stream root) == The path to your games install root folder, either default ~/.steam or some remote location. You will also need to download and unarchive the d9vk release (at the time 0.12).

Some List:
 1. Install the game and run it once so it will create the prefix under compatdata
 2. Shut down steam you its not fighting you with the prefix
 3. Remove the (steam root)/steamapps/compatdata/35140/pfx folder
 4. WINEPREFIX=(steam root)/steamapps/compatdata/35140/pfx winecfg [so wine creates an empty prefix]
 5. WINEPREFIX=(steam root)/steamapps/compatdata/35140/pfx winetricks vcrun2005 dotnet20 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43
 6. cd to your d9vk folder and run WINEPREFIX=(steam root)/steamapps/compatdata/35140/pfx ./setup_dxvk.sh install
 7. Restart steam start the game and enjoy

PS ProtonDB team: Formatting please?
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
The game will not work out of box but a few proton install tweaks are needed. Should work with the following protontrick command:
protontricks 35140 dotnet20 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10
I also used d9vk for much better framerate than Wine's built in DX9 layer:
https://github.com/Joshua-Ashton/d9vk/releases
Played through the whole game and challenges without issue, only getting the occasional stutter from the usual shader caching issues.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
On first run the launcher appeared. The various options like settings could be accessed but once the Start Game was clicked the splash screen would come up and a crash/error message would appear. The game failed to launched.

Had to use the command "protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10" for the game to launch. Did not require any Steam launch options. Performance appears to be as good as it was under the Windows install. The gameplay was as smooth as can be expected on my machine and so far did not experience any crashes or slow downs.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Prior to the release of Proton 4.11-1 with dx9 support through d9vk, the game was no longer than 45 ~ 50fps. Already with d9vk active, I have a consistency of 60fps and a very robust fluidity. As already mentioned, I needed to use protontricks to use d9vk, with the command protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10 in the game folder. Then just set the initialization parameters PROTON_NO_ESYNC = 1 PROTON_NO_D3D11 = 1 PROTON_USE_D9VK = 1 DXVK_HUD = full% command% that the game went perfectly.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: After using protontricks with "protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10" like others already suggested here the game runs fine. I'm also using D9VK with "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%" as launch option for a better performance.

title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
So, let's start with the fact that this is Unreal Engine 3 game and that brings a lot of issues on its own. There are some things that need to be done to achieve the best experience possible. First - install winetricks, protontricks and run this command in the terminal: protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10. Then disable frame rate smoothing: open folder where the game is installed, go to steamapps and from there navigate to compatdata/35140/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Square Enix/Batman Arkham Asylum GOTY/BmGame/Config. In there open BmEngine.ini and find and change bSmoothFrameRate from TRUE to FALSE. Fix stuttering and texture issues: in the same file from above find and change PoolSize value in the Texture streaming section and set it 2048. Also find the ThreadedShaderCompileThreshold in the DevOptions.Shaders section and set it to 2. 
This should be enough to get it running properly but if you have any issues here are some helpful links: https://pcgamingwiki.com/wiki/Batman:_Arkham_Asylum and https://pcgamingwiki.com/wiki/Engine:Unreal_Engine_3 I managed to get stable 60 fps on max settings except for motion blur and MSAA - these were turned off. P.S. I used only 2 gb of VRAM and 2 cores because setting these to higher values resulted in crashing.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Copying and pasting the info below as it worked perfectly for me: So, let's start with the fact that this is Unreal Engine 3 game and that brings a lot of issues on its own. There are some things that need to be done to achieve the best experience possible. First - install winetricks, protontricks and run this command in the terminal: protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10. Then disable frame rate smoothing: open folder where the game is installed, go to steamapps and from there navigate to compatdata/35140/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Square Enix/Batman Arkham Asylum GOTY/BmGame/Config. In there open BmEngine.ini and find and change bSmoothFrameRate from TRUE to FALSE. Fix stuttering and texture issues: in the same file from above find and change PoolSize value in the Texture streaming section and set it 2048. Also find the ThreadedShaderCompileThreshold in the DevOptions.Shaders section and set it to 2. This should be enough to get it running properly but if you have any issues here are some helpful links: https://pcgamingwiki.com/wiki/Batman:_Arkham_Asylum and https://pcgamingwiki.com/wiki/Engine:Unreal_Engine_3 I managed to get stable 60 fps on max settings except for motion blur and MSAA - these were turned off. P.S. I used only 2 gb of VRAM and 2 cores because setting these to higher values resulted in crashing.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes:
To run this game via epic games store, go Games/epic-games-store/drive_c/Program Files/Epic Games/BatmanArkhamAsylum/Binaries/ and run "winetricks mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10" (without "). After that, if you are in a "unsual" timezone (such as São Paulo - Brazil, as I am), run "TZ=America/New_York wine BMLauncher.exe". 
To further optimization, alter BmEngine.ini with the following changes that I found on the post bellow this one ("Then disable frame rate smoothing: open folder where the game is installed, go to steamapps and from there navigate to compatdata/35140/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Square Enix/Batman Arkham Asylum GOTY/BmGame/Config. In there open BmEngine.ini and find and change bSmoothFrameRate from TRUE to FALSE. Fix stuttering and texture issues: in the same file from above find and change PoolSize value in the Texture streaming section and set it 2048. Also find the ThreadedShaderCompileThreshold in the DevOptions.Shaders section and set it to 2. ").
If you want a easy shortcut, create a .sh launcher with the following commands:
cd "/home/YOUR USERNAME/Games/epic-games-store/drive_c/Program Files/Epic Games/BatmanArkhamAsylum/Binaries/"
TZ=America/New_York wine BMLauncher.exe
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Do just like everyone else said. The game runs very smoothly at 3440x1440
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Strangely enough non of the tweaks helped me initially, lots of crashing and could not start the game. After many reinstalls and 4.6.11 landing I was able to get it running by installing this `protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10`, and then using this launch option: `PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%`.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: Before any tweaks I was able to get the game to run but it would crash at every major savepoint/cutscene.  Tons of visual basic errors and other runtime pop-up errors.  However, after making these tweaks: Installing winetricks, protontricks and running this command in the terminal: protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10 I was ready to mess with launch options.  For launch commands I disabled ESync and turned on D9VK (PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1) (PROTON_USE_D9VK=1). I only had two freezes and crashes to desktop after that each in a separate part of the game so no consistent failures.  I was able to completely beat the game with the tweaks in place so this is entirely playable with only a few small glitches over several hours of play.
title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition

notes: This was originally borked for me on Ubuntu 16.04, but after a full re-install to Ubuntu (Mate) 18.04, and using the `protontricks 35140 mdx d3dx9 d3dcompiler_43 win10` command, the game now runs absolutely flawlessly. No issues with sounds, graphics, cut-scenes, music, or gamepad (Xbox360). It's great to replay this title after so many years.
